div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Paralegal uploads files
UploadSession + slots (resumable)
commit refuses incomplete sessions

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pages stage — pages.py
pdfplumber text fast path
density floor -> OCR port
(none | fake | tesseract)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
zero_text flag
(OCR_ENGINE=none default)
page kept, flagged for review

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Classify stage — classify.py
Haiku via the metered LLM door
LLM_PROVIDER=null -> doc type 'other'
+ needs_review, run continues

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dedup stage — dedup.py
page-hash + shingle overlap

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PENDING quarantine
human marks kept / superseded
NEVER auto-merged
